overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of an abandoned futuristic urban plaza in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring a large building with a rocky facade, scattered palm trees, and occasional vehicles. The camera descends through a covered walkway to a lower level revealing a massive holographic statue and flooded streets with abandoned cars.

delivery truck passes through the plaza from left to right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the open plaza toward the large central building with rocky facade

scaffolding and rubble from abandoned construction
green and black graffiti painted on the concrete ground

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a sunlit abandoned urban plaza with a distinctive rocky-facade building ahead. Palm trees dot the landscape while construction debris litters the right side. Two trucks pass through the plaza as the camera walks forward across the graffiti-covered concrete.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with overgrown tropical vegetation

events.description: entering covered walkway from open plaza
beginning descent down sloped path with glass railing

agents.ego_description: walking down a covered ramp with glass railings, surrounded by dense tropical plants

entered.detail: concrete overhead cover providing partial shade
dense palm plants and ferns growing along the path
transparent safety barrier along the descending path

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a covered walkway transitioning from the open plaza, with dense tropical vegetation lining the path. The environment shifts to a semi-enclosed space with mixed lighting as the camera descends a sloped walkway with glass railings.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunken plaza approach with water features

events.description: emerging from covered walkway into open sunken plaza level
massive holographic statue with green neon lines becomes visible in the plaza center

agents.ego_description: walking along the edge of the sunken plaza as the massive holographic statue comes into view

entered.detail: lower level plaza area partially filled with stagnant water
massive dark statue with glowing green neon lines depicting a human figure
abandoned cars partially submerged in the water
fallen palm tree trunk lying in the water

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the scene opens into a sunken plaza with a water-filled basin. A massive holographic statue with glowing green lines dominates the center as abandoned cars sit submerged in the water. The camera walks along the basin edge approaching the statue.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded underpass with abandoned vehicles and holographic installation

events.description: moving into darker covered area at the far end of the plaza

agents.ego_description: walking along the water's edge examining the abandoned submerged vehicles and massive holographic statue

notable_agents.action: distant figure standing near the building entrance in the background

entered.detail: rusted orange and gray sports car with doors open, partially submerged in water
dark tunnel-like passage under the building ahead
green-tinted building walls with large glass windows

segments.scene_description: The camera explores the flooded lower plaza, passing close to abandoned cars submerged in the water. The massive holographic statue stands to the left while the camera approaches a dark underpass ahead. The lighting dims significantly as the camera moves toward the covered tunnel area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunlit, debris-strewn urban plaza down into a dim, flooded subterranean level. It begins by walking across graffiti-covered concrete toward a building with a rocky facade, passing palm trees and moving trucks. As the camera enters a covered walkway, the open sunlight gives way to a semi-enclosed space lined with dense tropical vegetation while descending a sloped path with glass railings. The scene then opens into a sunken plaza where the environment shifts to a water-filled basin dominated by a massive holographic statue with glowing green lines and submerged abandoned cars. Finally, the camera moves along the basin's edge, passing the sunken vehicles as the lighting dims significantly while approaching a dark underpass.
